name: @sulesky/claude-marketplace
description: Claude Code marketplace ecosystem for OpenCode — discover, search and install plugins from Claude Code marketplaces using .claude-plugin/plugin.json directly.

commands.name: /marketplace-add
commands.description: Add a Claude Code marketplace (GitHub repo or Git URL)

commands.name: /plugin-marketplace-search
commands.description: Search for plugins across all Claude Code marketplaces

commands.name: /plugin-marketplace-install
commands.description: Install a plugin from a marketplace
